destinations.description: A cozy dreamy little beach town that feels like a cross between Europe and California.
highlights: Sleepy fishing village with epic beaches and surf
Such cute little groceries and markets to get beach picnic goodies

destinations.description: A marvelous medieval town high up in the French Alps with fairytale vibes
highlights: Playing card games and sipping wine at an artist cafe housed in the old town prison - Café des Arts
Eating fresh raclette cheese with pickles and bread at a local cheese shop
Biking around the lake and taking in the beautiful scenery
destinations.altText: Old medieval town of Annecy, France

destinations.description: My favorite place in the world - the most beautiful nature and hiking trails.
highlights: Reading a book in a hammock overlooking the river in Toulumne Meadows
Hiking the very steep but incredibly beautiful Upper Yosemite Falls Trail
Eating s'mores by the fire at the campgrounds after a long day of activities
destinations.altText: Yosemite National Park in California, USA

destinations.description: A glorious beach town with crystal clear water and a laid back vibes in the Oaxacan region
highlights: Swimming with hundreds of dolphins during their mating season
Eating coconut-fried fresh fish tacos every day
Sun bathing the numerous gorgeous beaches and coves

destinations.description: A lake high up in the Andes Mountain with an indigenous peoples called the Uros living on floating island made out of reeds
highlights: Collecting reeds from the lake to add to the floating foundations of the homes
Playing volleyball with the teenagers and little kids of this community
Hiking up to the top of the hill in Puno, the city on the shores of the lake, at 13,000ft
destinations.altText: Floating houses on Lake Titicaca in Peru

destinations.description: A beautifully busy mountain town full of coffee shops, fresh pine air, and delicious food.
highlights: Eating Banh Mi Xui Mai which are mouth watering pork meatballs and french bread
Riding the mountain coaster and jumping amongst the treetops in the nearby Datanla Waterfall
Getting lost in the central shopping market with the locals
destinations.altText: A giant pot of meatballs in Da Lat, Vietnam
